ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Gaps between keystrokes shorter than this count toward active typing time; longer gaps are treated as you stepping away. Sessions are never rolled over by idleness — minting is always explicit.
ast.target: 按键间隔短于此时间的将计入活动打字时间；较长的间隔被视为您已离开。会话不会因闲置而延续——铸造始终是显式的。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Show proof status for current note
ast.target: 显示当前笔记的证明状态

ast.name: name
ast.source: Forget recorded proof for current note
ast.target: 忘记当前笔记的已记录证明
